description: This file is the main HTML source for a web-based Database Viewer interface, including embedded CSS and JavaScript to handle database selection, table navigation, data retrieval, and display of database content.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches the list of databases from the server and populates the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the list of databases, resetting the view.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses a specific database to show its tables.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Loads the list of tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Loads and displays data for a selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Renders the data table in HTML format.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Creates HTML for a table cell, handling long text and objects for expansion.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content to show full data.
